title: Action under Section 8(1)(b) against Shri Diwakar Gupta, absconders

"$w, ^ [TO U l / 2 / 2 0 0 9 - ^ | s [ ^ H i l H l H * 0 1641 GI/2009 MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) ORDER New Delhi, the 30th April, 2009 S.0.1075(E).—Whereas the Joint Secretary to the Government of India specially empowered under sub- section (1) of Section 3 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic in Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 issued Order F.No. 1 /2/2009-PITNDPS dated 25-2-2009 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Diwakar Gupta S/o Shri Ram Ashray Gupta, resident of Kalkaji, Delhi be detained and kept in custody in the Central Jail, Tihar, New Delhi with a view to preventing him from engaging in dealing in narcotic drugs and organizing drug trafficking activities. 2, Whereas the Central Government has reason to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded himself so that the order cannot be executed. 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 8 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before Shri Ajay Kumar, Superintendent, Delhi Zonal Unit, West BIcok-l, Wing- VII, R.K. Puram, New Delhi within 10 days of the publication of this order in the Official Gazette. [F.No.l/2/2009-PITNDPS] NITA GUPTA, Under Secy. Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press and Published by the Controller Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-l 10064 of Publications, Delhi-l 10054. -- 1 of 1 --
